settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and password.
settings.profileDescription: Information synced from your account profile.
settings.preferencesDescription: Theme and language are saved on this device.
settings.notificationsDescription: Choose delivery channels and event types for your account updates.
settings.notificationEventsDescription: Turn off low-priority updates without muting critical system messages.
settings.inAppEnabledDescription: Show updates in the notification menu while you use the platform.
settings.emailEnabledDescription: Receive selected updates by email when SMTP is configured on the server.
settings.enrollmentSuccessDescription: Course enrollment confirmations and access updates.
settings.coursePublishedDescription: Publishing updates for courses you manage.
settings.logoutDescription: Sign out on this device and return to login.
settings.logoutError: Could not log out. Try again.
